dlc1.description: Whenever C4SH Critically Hits an enemy with a Gun, Bleed that enemy. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy with Bleed with a Critically Hit, he gains a 7% Chance to spawn a [roll_icon]Chaos Totem. While [wfll_icon]Windfall is active, double that Chance.
dlc1.red_text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.

l01.description: Sleight of Hand gains Reduced Charges. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy with a Card, he gains {0} Charges and resets his Action Skill Duration.

l02.description: Whenever C4SH rolls his Bone Dice, he gains Ludopath Stacks equal to the roll. C4SH gains {2} Fire Rate and {4} Movement Speed for every Ludopath Stack. C4SH has a Max of {0} Ludopath Stacks and each Stack lasts for {1} seconds.

l03.description: Cross-Fire's Burst Fire is replaced with a Beam Spin Attack that deals [fire_icon][fire]Fire[/fire] [fire]Damage[/fire]. If [wfll_icon]Windfall is active, these Beams always Critically Hit enemies.

l04.description: Whenever C4SH deals Ordnance Damage to an enemy, that enemy becomes Jinxed. Whenever C4SH kills a Jinxed enemy, he gains {0} Ordnance Cooldown Rate for {1} seconds. This effect stacks up to {2} times.
l04.red_text: Do do that voodoo that you do so well.

l05.description: C4SH's Action Skill Cooldown Rate is reduced to 0 and all Action Skill Cooldown Rate bonuses are converted into Action Skill Damage. Whenever he gains a Stack of [frtn_icon]Fortune, he restores {0} of his Action Skill Cooldown, gains {1} Fire Rate, and {2} Reload Speed for {3} seconds.
l05.red_text: I have not yet begun to defile myself.

l06.description: Whenever C4SH kills an enemy with a Critical Hit from a Gun, he doubles his [frtn_icon]Fortune Stacks, otherwise killing an enemy with a Gun drains half of C4SH's [frtn_icon]Fortune Stacks. Whenever C4SH gains [frtn_icon]Fortune, he restores {0} of his Maximum Health. Whenever C4SH loses [frtn_icon]Fortune, he gains {1} of his Max Overshield.
l06.red_text: Play to win. Never play to not lose.

raid1.description: Whenever C4SH kills an enemy, gain a stack of Hooligan. Whenever C4SH deals Grenade Damage, consume all Hooligan Stacks and deal {0} [fire_icon][fire]Bonus[/fire] [fire]Fire Damage[/fire] per Stack. If [wfll_icon]Windfall is active, only consume half of the Stacks. C4SH can have up to {1} Hooligan Stacks.
raid1.red_text: Here we go, here we go, here we go!
